title: 桜花賞の後に・次のティアラヘ

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Dang, the Oka Sho was no joke. Everyone gave
me a real run for my money.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Not bad for our first taste of the Tiara tour. Heh,
things are looking good!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Oaks won't be a walk in the park
either, though. Let's keep up the heat, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hop on the train home, only to spot an ad for
the Satsuki Sho featuring none other than Narita
Brian.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me—the Satsuki Sho is happening
next week. I heard through the grapevine that
Brian's a step above the rest.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I wonder what she's got up her sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I bet she's gotten crazy strong. Way better than
she was before...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, I know what's going on my plate tonight!
I'm boilin' up a protein-packed hot pot for those
muscle gains!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's swing by the shopping district on the way
back, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our detour, Hishi Amazon returns to the
dorm carrying two grocery bags full of chicken.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Japanese Oaks around the corner, she's
raring to go!
